pr_description:
Hello man, first I wanna thank you for this great lib.

I'm using it on a personal project and realized that It would be interesting to have a "paste string" feature, like requested on #43 

There's a workaround using callFunction to set element innerHTML, but it's better to have this as a feature.

My goal with this is to increase "human behavior" to the typing effect, as no one types a link, for example, we just paste it.

I tried to reuse your typeString code and event switch block as the change to achieve this is tiny. 

**Changes proposed**
This PR adds a paste string feature that allows a string to be "pasted" instead of typed:
![TypewriterPaste](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/13091635/75996807-2c2ab080-5edd-11ea-8436-6fc4e9bd5344.gif)
commit_message: test: add tests to pasteString feature
